name: interact4trust-air-quality-study
description: Humidity Prediction Visualization Trust Study - Experiment 3 with 3 technique versions and 4 within-participant interaction styles

scripts.test: echo 'Open http://localhost:8000 in browser to test experiment with PHP data saving - npm start to run server'
scripts.lint: echo 'No linting configured - using vanilla JavaScript'
scripts.build: node generate_versions.js && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r src dist/ && cp -r display dist/ && cp save_data.php complete_study.php simple_index.html dist/ && mv dist/simple_index.html dist/index.html && mkdir -p dist/data dist/generated && cp -f generated/*.json dist/generated/ && for d in versions/version*/; do cp -r "$d" dist/$(basename "$d"); done && for d in dist/version*/; do [ -d "$d" ] && mkdir -p "$d/generated" && cp -f dist/generated/*.json "$d/generated/"; done && echo 'Multi-version build complete'

author: Research Team
